name: Earth Law Center
description: Developing legal frameworks to protect rivers, forests, and ecosystems through rights of nature.

name: Democratic Cities
description: Network of cities implementing participatory democracy tools — from citizens' assemblies to participatory budgeting.

name: Destination Earth
description: EU initiative to build a digital twin of Earth for climate modelling and disaster preparedness.

name: Commons Transition
description: Policy framework and practical guides for transitioning toward commons-based peer production economies.

name: The Long Game Megagame
description: Large-scale simulation game where 200+ players govern a future Earth facing climate and geopolitical crises.

name: Biocultural Diversity Index
description: Framework for measuring and protecting the intersection of biological and cultural diversity worldwide.

name: Liquid Democracy Infrastructure
description: Open-source tools enabling fluid delegation of votes, allowing anyone to be a delegate or delegate to experts.

name: Regenerative Land Trust Network
description: Network of land trusts using legal and financial structures to protect land for regenerative stewardship in perpetuity.
